calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-09-2010 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-09-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Hewlett; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Shui Sin Cheng, is present.
Attorney, Frannie Mok, special appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Edward Xu, is present.
Attorneys, Christopher Whitman and Emily Chaley, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Ernest Haperlin, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of NOV-15-2010 is vacated.
